scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c yellow,green,blue "npm --workspace shared run dev" "npm --workspace server run dev" "npm --workspace web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace shared run build && npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck
scripts.test:coverage: npm --workspace shared run test:coverage && npm --workspace server run test:coverage && npm --workspace web run test:coverage
